$comment: Config for the workflow plugin (~/.config/opencode/plugins/workflow.ts). A project can override any key via <worktree>/.opencode/workflow.json. Restart opencode after editing because model profiles are baked into the tool description at startup. 'models' is the allowlist of exact model and reasoning-variant pairs for workflow agents; each 'note' guides when to select that profile and name distinct verifier perspectives. Empty list means agents use the session default model.

models.note: The jack of all trades. Use for most general tasks, investigation, synthesis, and moderately complex work.
The implementer. Use for complex implementation, and larger-scale changes.
The runner. Use for deterministic lookup, extraction, classification, formatting, scans, and most browser use. Escalate when work is ambiguous or judgment-heavy.
